characters.name: Albert Molina
characters.description: Albert MolinaBackground informationFirst episodeHit It, Toofus!Last episodeSo This is GlamsterdamVoice ActorAlfred MolinaCharacter informationNickname(s)Dr. MolinaGenderMaleSpeciesHumanStatusOccupationPsychiatristRelationshipsFamilyAnsi Molina(son)Ansi's Mother(ex wife)[Source]Albert Molinais the father ofAnsi MolinainWelcome to the Wayne. He is voiced byAlfred Molina. Albert Molina has a light brown skin, black hair, and he wears circular glasses. He wears a long-sleeved white dress shirt, with a dark plum vest, a dark green blazer, a dark green pants, and light brown shoes. In "Keep an Eye on the Nose" and "So This is Glamsterdam" Albert Molina looks same except he no longer wears his Dark Green Blazer after the sleeves were ripped off during The Dinner Party.

characters.name: Andrei
characters.description: AndreiBackground informationFirst episodeToday Was WassomeLast episodeWhoever Controls the Wayne, Controls the WorldVoice ActorAndrew RannellsCharacter informationNickname(s)The vampire(bySaraline TimbersandThe Spy from Apartment 8I)Duke and leader of the vampiresGenderMaleSpeciesVampirePowers and abilitiesExtreme StrengthExtreme FlexibilityGlows in the DarkHas no ReflectionLevitationWeaponsHis powersStatusHomeThe WayneGlamsterdamRelationshipsFriends/AlliesAnsi MolinaOlly TimbersSaraline TimbersGeneral Ia'ctharWendell WassermanLeif Bornewell lllDennis O’BannonGoodnessKatherine AliceJulia WilesEnemiesMoonfishYelena BishopMastersonFlowershirt[Source]Andreiis a recurring character inWelcome to the Wayne. He is a friendly vampire and a resident ofthe Wayne. He suffers amnesia so his memories and background are still unknown, although he does remember that he is the duke and the leader of theVampiresinGlamsterdam. He wears a light-black T-shirt with a weird 78 symbol in the middle, blue jeans, and brown boots with 4 crisscrossed laces on each boot. He has pointy ears, yellow eyes, light green skin, that glows in the dark, and most of his hair shaved off, with a dark purple tuft of hair on the top of his head. He is slightly taller thanAnsi Molina. During the events of "Spacefish", he got a tattoo of a weapon (most likely a one-sided lance) with a batwing on one side of the handle on his left arm, glowing eyes, and sharper teeth. Andrei is a kind, brave, nervous, and fun guy for anyone to be with. He really likes to meet new people with his unique handshake - shaking his rear - and he doesn't want to hurt the ones he cares about.

During the events of "Spacefish", he got a tattoo of a weapon (most likely a one-sided lance) with a batwing on one side of the handle on his left arm, glowing eyes, and sharper teeth. Andrei is a kind, brave, nervous, and fun guy for anyone to be with. He really likes to meet new people with his unique handshake - shaking his rear - and he doesn't want to hurt the ones he cares about.

characters.name: Ansi Molina
characters.description: Ansi MolinaBackground informationFirst episodeChapter 1(webseries)Rise and Shine Sleepyhead(TV series)Last episodeWhoever Controls the Wayne, Controls the WorldVoice ActorAlanna UbachCharacter informationFull nameAnsi Molina-DelgadoNickname(s)Andy (byLeif Bornewell lll)Patricia (byFurton BinklemurtonandOlly Timbers)GenderMaleSpeciesHumanWeaponsKendo Sword(web-series)Zig Zag SwordW.E.E.L. of TrainingStatusHomeThe WayneOccupationDetective (self-appointed)Kendo pupil (formerly)AffiliationsTeam TimbersThe GyreRelationshipsFamilyAlbert Molina(father)Ansi's Mother(mother)Friends/AlliesOlly Timbers(best friend)Saraline TimbersThe ArcsineJulia Wiles(crush)Jonah BishopLeif Bornewell lllJohn KeatsTony StanzaWendell WassermanAndreiMadison PayneClara RhoneGeorge the DoormanGoodnessKatherine AliceDennis O’BannonBobbyTommyEnemiesPrismalYelena Bishop(formerly)Masterson(formerly)Flowershirt[Source] "As we continue to develop the show in the long-form series, one of the big questions we wanted to find out about Ansi was, what's he about in other ways? And we discovered that he's got a real dashing, adventuresome heroism to him. He thrives off of the stuff that Olly throws at him, even though he would be inclined in other circumstances to run the other direction; something about The Wayne, something about Olly and all of that stuff brings out the adventurous side in Ansi." —Billy Lopez

characters.name: Bianca Davis
characters.description: Bianca Davis is a minor character ofWelcome to the Wayne.Bianca DavisBackground informationFirst episodeWiles Styles You OverVoice ActorLiza KoshyCharacter informationGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanStatusRelationshipsFriends/AlliesSaraline Timbers(sparingly)EnemiesSaraline Timbers(at times)[Source] Bianca has pink eye shadow and lipstick for makeup, and for attire, she wears a teal top, a pink coatigan with a cupcake on the left, a purple necklace, purple headband, and an orange skirt. Bianca is often sarcastic, selfish, snooty, and she is a social media superstar. However, when she noticed that Saraline was getting better on social media, she was impressed about this.

Buckles the Clown is a very tall, lanky and skinny clown. He has messy red hair and a beard. His face is painted with clown makeup. He wears a top hat on his head. He wears a light blue bodysuit with three buttons on it (two red and one yellow). He wears yellow gloves and dark red shoes. TBA

characters.name: Butcher
characters.description: The ButcherBackground informationFirst episodeLike No Other Market on EarthVoice ActorStephanie D'AbruzzoCharacter informationGenderFemaleSpeciesUnknownStatusOccupationButcherBakerRelationshipsEnemiesSaraline TimbersGremlins[Source]TheButcheris an unnamed character and minor antagonist inWelcome to the Wayne. She appears only inLike No Other Market on Earth. The Butcher is an tall, lanky humanoid bearing a single eye on her face with long, messy strains of hair on her head. She wears a white shirt with long sleeves and an orange apron with stains on it. She is dedicated to her work as she wanted to make sure none of theGremlinsleft and she also mentioned working as a Baker in the weekends. She also thought thatSaralinewas a Gremlin because of their similarities.

characters.name: Dennis O’Bannon
characters.description: Dennis O’BannonBackground informationFirst episodeBeeping the BinklemobileLast episodeWhoever Controls the Wayne, Controls the WorldVoice ActorEmo PhilipsCharacter informationGenderMaleSpeciesHumanStatusRelationshipsFriends/AlliesAnsi MolinaOlly TimbersSaraline TimbersGoodnessWendell WassermanLeif Bornewell lllClara RhoneKatherine AliceAndreiTony StanzaJulia WilesEnemiesYelena BishopFlowershirtMastersonPrismal[Source]Dennis O’Bannonis a supporting character inWelcome to the Waynewho made his first appearance in "Beeping the Binklemobile". He is an upper-class tennis-playing rich kid who usually bullies and teasesTeam Timbersfor his own enjoyment (and sometimes for fun). However, he later befriends them once it was discovered that Dennis had the ability to seeWayne Phenomenawithout suffering any repercussions. Dennis is a lanky fair-skinned boy with long, voluminous yellow hair that reaches past his shoulders and a very pronounced nose. He wears a red tracksuit with white stripes and a yellow pocket that resembles a badge. Unlike most tracksuits, his has shorts rather than long pants. He also wears a white sweatband with a red stripe running through it on his head and red and white running shoes. He seems to be very cocky and often brags.

characters.description: EquimorphShapeshifterNormalBackground informationFirst episodeLike No Other Market on EarthVoice ActorBilly Lopez(Equimorph/posing as Olly)Robbie Sublett(posing as Brian)Marc Thompson(posing as Masterson)Alanna Ubach(posing as Ansi Molina)Dana Steingold(posing as Saraline)Nikki M. James(posing as Julia)Tom Kenny( as SpongeRobert RectangleShorts)Character informationNickname(s)Brian (Human disguise)GenderMalePowers and abilitiesShapeshiftingStatusRelationships[Source]Equimorphis an unnamed Wayne Phenomena shapeshifter who first appeared in the episode "Like No Other Market on Earth". He’s mostly a tall orange transparent humanoid shapeshifter who can manipulate or imitate another person's appearance and act identically to them. His true form though is that of a small horse man with a t-shirt and jeans. The Equimorph, while initially antagonistic, is shown to be very friendly towardsTeam Timbers.

characters.name: Eraser face
characters.description: Eraser Facewas a villainous monster who appeared inWe're Gonna Need a Bigger Cup. As you can see from the name, his ability is to erase things with his face.Eraser FaceInformationSpeciesUnknownAlignmentBadPowers and abilitiesErasing stuff with its face[Source]  He is a large, hulking reptilian monster with a hunchbacked appearance. He has spines growing on the back of his head. His strong, muscular arms are tipped with razor-sharp talons. It has seven eyes on its face. Its body comes in varying shades of green. It has long digitigrade feet.

His skin is a pale green and his eyes are yellow. He is partially bald, save for a batch of navy blue hair on his head. His ears and nose are greyish green. characters.name: George the Doorman
characters.description: George the DoormanBackground informationFirst episode"Rise and Shine Sleepyhead"Last episode"Whoever Controls the Wayne, Controls the World"Voice ActorBill Lobley(Pilot)Dave Willis(TV Series)Character informationGenderMaleSpeciesHumanStatusOccupationDoormanRelationshipsFriends/AlliesAnsi MolinaOlly TimbersSaraline TimbersLeif Bornewell lll[Source]George the Doormanis a doorman who works atThe Wayne. He was voiced byBill Lobleyin the pilotWelcome to the Wayne.In the TV Series he is voiced byDave Willis. George has a gray mustache that covers most of his lower face. He wears a red overcoat with yellow stripes, a white shirt, a red necktie, black pants, with a red hat and wears brown shoes. George is well mannered, nice and gets along withAnsi,Saraline, andOllyand was happy to giveAndreia tour aroundThe Wayne.
